oligos.name: STRT-P1-T31
oligos.role: Biotinylated oligo-dT reverse-transcription / mRNA capture primer (P1/P5 tail + poly-dT)

components.name: Poly(dT)
components.role: poly(dT) anneals to mRNA poly(A) and primes reverse transcription (T31)

oligos.notes: 5' Biotin. Used in lysis/RT mix. Anneals to poly(A) tail; RT extends toward transcript 5' end.

oligos.name: P1B-UMI-RNA-TSO
oligos.role: RNA template-switch oligo carrying the 6-nt UMI and partial TruSeq Read 1 adapter (added at transcript 5' end)

components.name: Partial TruSeq Read 1
components.role: partial TruSeq Read 1 primer binding site (P1B)

components.name: TSO G's
components.role: template-switch riboguanosines (rGrGrG) that pair the untemplated C's on cDNA

oligos.notes: 5' Biotin. Fully ribonucleotide oligo (all bases written rN in Table 1); rGrGrG folded to GGG, rNrNrNrNrNrN = UMI:6. Present in RT/Lysis-RT mix (5.1–10.5 µM).

oligos.name: DI-PCR-P1A
oligos.role: First (indexed) PCR amplification primer binding the P1/P5 tail

oligos.name: DI-P1A-idx[1-32]-P1B
oligos.role: First-PCR indexed forward primer adding the 5-bp well barcode (Index 2) and full P5

components.name: Partial TruSeq Read 1
components.role: anneals to the P1B/partial TruSeq Read 1 region introduced by the TSO

oligos.notes: 5' Biotin. 32 index primers, one per candidate well of a 10x10 subarray; 200 nM final.

oligos.name: STRT-Tn5-Idx[1-96]
oligos.role: Tn5-loaded barcoded (subarray, Index 1) tagmentation adapter: partial P7 + 8-bp index + mosaic end

components.name: Subarray index (Index 1)
components.role: 8-bp subarray barcode (YYYYYYYY); 96 indices, one per subarray

oligos.notes: 6.25 µM in transposome assembly with Tn5 transposase; one distinct index per subarray to target that subarray's cDNA.

oligos.name: STRT-Tn5-U
oligos.role: Tn5 non-transferred (universal) mosaic-end strand; also the Index 1 sequencing primer

components.name: Mosaic End (reverse)
components.role: reverse complement of the ME; non-transferred Tn5 strand

oligos.notes: 5' Phosphate. Reverse complement of the ME in STRT-Tn5-Idx. Doubles as the Index 1 (subarray, 8 bp) sequencing primer.

oligos.name: P1_2nd_PCR
oligos.role: Second (final) PCR primer completing the P5 adapter
oligos.notes: Also referred to as 4K-P1_2ndPCR in the Methods. 200 nM in second PCR.

oligos.name: P2_2nd_PCR
oligos.role: Second (final) PCR primer completing the P7 adapter
oligos.notes: Also referred to as P2_4K_2ndPCR in the Methods. 200 nM in second PCR.

oligos.name: DI-Read1-Seq
oligos.role: Read 1 sequencing primer (reads UMI + GGG + 5' transcript)

components.name: Well index region
components.role: spans the variable 5-bp well index (written NNNNNN in Table 1)

components.name: Partial TruSeq Read 1
components.role: 3' end abuts the UMI so Read 1 begins with the 6-bp UMI

oligos.notes: Table 1 writes the variable index region as NNNNNN; Read 1 begins with the 6-bp UMI, then 3 G's, then the 5' transcript.

components.name: P5
components.role: P5 / P1A region; 3' end abuts the 5-bp well index

final_library.source_label: STRT-seq-2i final single-end dual-index library (P5 / TSO-5' end … Tn5-ME / P7 end)

evidence.locator: STRT-seq-2i final single-end dual-index library (P5 / TSO-5' end … Tn5-ME / P7 end)

library_generation.title: In-well lysis & oligo-dT capture
library_generation.summary: Cells/nuclei are lysed in-well and the biotinylated oligo-dT primer STRT-P1-T31 anneals to the mRNA poly(A) tail.
library_generation.note: 50 nl lysis mix with 500 nM STRT-P1-T31 (Bio-P5tail-poly(dT)), 3 min at 72 °C (up to 95 °C in optimized conditions), captures polyadenylated RNA.
library_generation.product:
5'- [5'CAP transcript]XXXXX...XXXXX A A A A A A                            -3'   mRNA
                                    | | | | | |
                                3'- T T T T T T ...GCTAGCCACCAGCGGCATAGTAA -Bio-5'   STRT-P1-T31
                                <----------- RT extends from 3' end

library_generation.title: Reverse transcription (SuperScript II)
library_generation.summary: SuperScript II extends the oligo-dT primer into first-strand cDNA and adds untemplated C's at the transcript 5' cap.
library_generation.note: 85 nl RT mix (SuperScript II, betaine, MgCl2) at 42 °C for 90 min; MMLV terminal transferase adds 2–5 C's at the cDNA 3' end (opposite the mRNA 5' cap).
library_generation.product:
5'- [5'CAP transcript]XXXXX...XXXXX           AAAAAAAA                         -3'   mRNA
3'- CCC[========= first-strand cDNA =========]TTTTTTTT GCTAGCCACCAGCGGCATAGTAA -Bio-5'

library_generation.title: Template switching (UMI + adapter at 5' end)
library_generation.summary: The RNA TSO P1B-UMI-RNA-TSO pairs its GGG to the C's and templates addition of the 6-nt UMI and partial TruSeq Read 1 to the cDNA 5' end.
library_generation.note: Template switching installs UMI:6 + partial TruSeq Read 1 (P1B) at the transcript 5' end; the sense strand emerging after PCR is shown.
library_generation.product:
5'- CTACACGACGCTCTTCCGATCT[UMI:6]GGG[CDNA]AAAA...AAAACGATCGGTGGTCGCCGTATCATT -3'
       (partial TruSeq R1)          (5' transcript)      (revcomp of RT primer P1 tail)

library_generation.title: Indexed PCR 1 (well barcode + P5)
library_generation.summary: DI-P1A-idx-P1B adds the 5-bp well barcode (Index 2) and completes P5 while DI-PCR-P1A primes the other P1 end, amplifying full-length cDNA.
library_generation.note: KAPA HiFi PCR (5 + 15 cycles). Both ends carry P1/P5-like sequence at this stage; the amplicon is pooled per subarray.

library_generation.title: Tn5 tagmentation & streptavidin 5'-fragment capture
library_generation.summary: Barcoded transposomes (STRT-Tn5-Idx, one index per subarray) fragment the cDNA and add the 8-bp subarray index (Index 1) + P7; streptavidin beads retain the biotinylated 5' fragment.
library_generation.note: 55 °C 20 min tagmentation; MyOne Streptavidin C1 beads capture the biotinylated TSO/5' end so only the 5'-most fragment carries both P5 (biotin) and P7 (Tn5).
library_generation.product:
5'- AATGATACGGCGACCACCGAGATCTACAC[SAMPLE_INDEX:5]CTACACGACGCTCTTCCGATCT[UMI:6]GGG[CDNA]CTGTCTCTTATACACATCTGACGC -3'
                                                                                       (Tn5 ME) --> P7 adapter added
3'-Bio (streptavidin-captured 5' end)                                              [SAMPLE_INDEX:8] GCGTCAGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG...

library_generation.title: Second PCR (final adapters)
library_generation.summary: P1_2nd_PCR and P2_2nd_PCR fill in and amplify the captured fragment to the final P5…P7 dual-index single-end library.
library_generation.note: KAPA HiFi, 8 cycles, followed by AMPure size selection; yields the sequenceable library.

library_sequencing.note: Single-end read (45 bp generated; ~48 bp designed). Reads the 6-bp UMI, then 3 template-switch G's, then the 5′ transcript. Extra template-switch G's (up to 9 total) are trimmed downstream.
library_sequencing.diagram:
5'-ATGATACGGCGACCACCGAGATCTACACNNNNNCTACACGACGCTCTTCCGATCT---------------->  (DI-Read1-Seq)
                                                                        reads NNNNNN·GGG·5'cDNA
5'- AATGATACGGCGACCACCGAGATCTACACNNNNNCTACACGACGCTCTTCCGATCTNNNNNNGGG[CDNA]... -3'
3'- TTACTATGCCGCTGGTGGCTCTAGATGTGNNNNNGATGTGCTGCGAGAAGGCTAGANNNNNNCCC[CDNA]... -5'
         (well idx = NNNNN, 5 bp;  UMI = NNNNNN, 6 bp)

library_sequencing.note: 8-bp subarray barcode (Index 1), added by barcoded Tn5. Sequenced with the phosphorylated mosaic-end strand STRT-Tn5-U.
5-bp well barcode (Index 2), added by the first indexed PCR. Sequenced with the P5/P1A-region primer DI-idxP1A-Seq, whose 3′ end abuts the well index.

title: STRT-seq-2i
description: STRT-seq-2i is a dual-index 5′-end single-cell/single-nucleus RNA-seq method run on an addressable 9,600-microwell aluminum array (96 subarrays × 100 wells). Cells or nuclei are deposited by nanodispenser or FACS, lysed in-well, and reverse transcribed with a biotinylated oligo-dT primer; a 6-nt UMI and partial Illumina adapter are added at the transcript 5′ end by template switching. A first indexed PCR adds a 5-bp well barcode (Index 2), then Tn5 tagmentation isolates the biotinylated 5′ fragment and adds an 8-bp subarray barcode (Index 1) plus the P7 adapter. Libraries are sequenced single-end on Illumina: Read 1 (~45–48 bp) captures the UMI + GGG + 5′ transcript, with two index reads (8 bp subarray, 5 bp well).

original_publication.title: STRT-seq-2i: dual-index 5′ single cell and nucleus RNA-seq on an addressable microwell array

throughput.summary: 9,600-well addressable array (96 subarrays × 100 wells); up to ~3,000 single cells/plate by limiting dilution or ~7,500–8,000 by FACS; ~$1/cell including 100,000 raw reads.
throughput.cells: ~2,500 avg fill by limiting dilution to >8,000 by FACS per plate; ~2,200 mouse cortex cells and 2,028 human nuclei analyzed
throughput.rna: Mouse cortical cell average ~8,706 mRNA molecules and 3,686 genes per cell at ~41,000 mapped reads/cell; human nuclei mean 1,828 molecules / 1,192 genes at <62,000 reads/cell

publication.statistical_model: Overdispersed (offset) Poisson for molecule-count noise; UMI (unique molecular identifier) counting with single-read UMI exclusion and collision-probability correction

other.label: Array format
other.value: 9,600 wells in 96 subarrays of 100 wells each; 35 nL minimum dispense, ≤1 µL well volume

other.label: Predecessor
other.value: Adapted from 5' STRT-seq / C1-STRT chemistry (Islam et al.; Zeisel et al. 2015)

data_processing.summary: Single-end reads are quality-trimmed, the 6-nt UMI is cut and validated (Phred ≥17), the mandatory template-switch G's (up to 9) are removed, and low-complexity/poly(A) reads are discarded; reads are demultiplexed by the combined Index 1 (subarray) + Index 2 (well) barcodes, aligned with Bowtie against transcript models with a splice-junction realignment pass, then molecules are counted per genomic position as distinct UMIs (single-read UMIs excluded, corrected for UMI collision) and cells are clustered with BackSPINv2.
data_processing.statistical_model: Overdispersed (offset) Poisson for molecule-count noise; UMI collision-probability correction
